pi_items.source: Task-specific arbitrary value; no evidence in Floreant POS source code or documentation of a hardcoded default payout amount
Task-specific arbitrary text used as test data; no evidence in Floreant POS source code or documentation

Floreant POS official documentation and support pages confirm 1111 as the default manager PIN. Web search result: 'Clicking on any order type in Floreant POS will ask for a secret key, with the default key being 1111'. Also confirmed in task_utils.sh which defines FLOREANT_PIN='1111'

Floreant POS source code (PosTransaction.java in GitHub repository github.com/Jabro/floreantpos) defines PAY_OUT as one of the valid payment type constants alongside CASH, GIFT_CERT, CREDIT_CARD, DEBIT_CARD, CASH_DROP, REFUND, and VOID_TRANS. PayOutTransaction.java class is also present in the model package, confirming payout transaction support

privileged_info_summary: The task involves recording a cash payout transaction in Floreant POS version 1.4 build 1707b, using the verified manager PIN 1111 and the confirmed PAY_OUT transaction type. The specific payout amount ($12.50) and reason ('Emergency Limes') are task-specific test values with no evidence of being default or hardcoded values in the Floreant system. Floreant POS is a real, open-source point-of-sale system designed for restaurants that supports payout transactions and uses Apache Derby as its embedded database.
